identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Zoom In. Negative Space. Contrast.

project.name: SentCom Trade Command
project.core_problem: Separating high-frequency system logs (Stream) from stable user dialogue (Chat) to prevent flickering and cognitive overload.

rules.mono: Use for all data, prices, and system logs
rules.uppercase: Use for labels, tabs, and tiny headers (text-[10px])

spacing.philosophy: Generous. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical SaaS.

layout_options.name: The Neural Split (Asymmetrical Side-by-Side)
layout_options.concept: Left Hemisphere (Chat) vs. Right Hemisphere (Pulse). Distinct visual languages for distinct speeds.

chat_area.features: Glass message bubbles, large typography, smooth scroll, media-rich

stream_area.style: bg-[#050505] border-l border-white/10 font-mono text-xs h-full overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar
stream_area.features: Terminal style, no bubbles, matrix-green/cyan text, rapid updates, 'scanline' overlay

layout_options.visual_details: The separation is stark. The Chat feels like a modern messenger (iMessage/Slack but cyberpunk). The Stream feels like a Linux terminal. This prevents the 'flickering' of the chat because the rapid updates happen in a physically separate, darker container that recedes visually.

layout_options.name: The Peripheral HUD (Ambient Focus)
layout_options.concept: The Trader is the Pilot. The Chat is the windshield. The Stream is the dashboard instruments.

components.style: h-8 bg-black/80 border-t border-white/10 flex items-center overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap font-mono text-[10px] text-cyan-500/80
components.behavior: Ticker tape scrolling of low-priority logs

components.style: absolute right-4 bottom-20 w-72 flex flex-col gap-2 pointer-events-none
components.behavior: High-priority alerts (Risk/Stops) slide in as 'Holographic Toasts', glow, and fade out. Stacking order: Newest bottom.
Container border pulses color based on bot state (Green=Scanning, Red=Risk)

layout_options.visual_details: Reduces cognitive load by moving 'noise' to the periphery. You only look at the stream when something flashes or the ticker catches your eye.
layout_options.mockup_ref: HUD Overlay: [ Chat Center ] + [ Ticker Bottom ] + [ Floating Alerts Right ]

layout_options.name: The Z-Axis Stack (Focus Toggle)
layout_options.concept: Depth over Width. The 'Matrix' is always running behind the reality.

stream_layer.style: absolute inset-0 p-8 font-mono text-xs text-zinc-700 overflow-hidden opacity-30 select-none pointer-events-none transition-opacity duration-300
stream_layer.content: Full screen waterfall of logs. 'The Code'.

chat_layer.style: absolute inset-4 md:inset-12 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
chat_layer.behavior: When user types/hovers, this layer is opaque. When user holds 'Alt' or toggles 'Monitor Mode', this layer becomes semi-transparent (opacity-50) and blur reduces, revealing the Stream behind it.

layout_options.visual_details: Gamified interaction. 'Ghost in the Machine' vibe. Perfect for single-screen setups where screen real estate is premium.
layout_options.mockup_ref: Layered: [ Background Stream ] < [ Foreground Glass Chat ]

layout_options.name: The Timeline Merge (Chronological Axis)
layout_options.concept: A single source of truth, bifurcated by type.

axis_line.style: absolute left-1/2 top-0 bottom-0 w-px bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-cyan-500/20 to-transparent transform -translate-x-1/2

stream_items.position: w-[45%] pr-8 text-right self-start ml-auto mr-[50%]

layout_options.visual_details: Visualizes the 'Cause and Effect'. You see a stream log 'Stop Loss Triggered' on the left, immediately followed by the AI saying 'I adjusted your risk' on the right.

universal_rules: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all Stream/Log elements.
Stream containers must have 'scroll-behavior: smooth' but use a virtual list (react-window) if logs exceed 100 items to prevent DOM lag.
Chat input must always be anchored to the bottom.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure stream text (zinc-500) passes AA contrast against black background.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the Z-Axis transitions.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Create the file structure for the chosen option (Recommend Option 1 or 2 for immediate MVP stability).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Refactor SentCom.jsx to split 'messages' state into 'conversation_messages' and 'system_logs'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Implement the two scroll containers with independent overflow handling.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Apply the 'Glass Crystal' surface style to the Chat and 'Terminal' style to the Stream.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure the 'flickering' is solved by memoizing the StreamItem component.
